套餐名称和完整菜品组成: Combo meal name and complete dish composition
原价与活动价（确保利润可覆盖）: Original price and promotional price (ensure profit coverage)

80-120字朋友圈文案，含表情符号: 80-120 character social media post with emojis
仅供格式参考，实际请根据你的套餐信息生成: For format reference only, please generate based on your actual combo meal information
套餐名称、价格、活动时间是否与实际一致: Check if combo name, price, and campaign dates match reality
菜品描述是否真实存在于你的菜单中: Check if dish descriptions actually exist on your menu
是否包含绝对化用语或虚假宣传: Check for absolute claims or false advertising
行动号召是否具体可执行（暗号、优惠券等）: Check if call-to-action is specific and actionable (codes, coupons, etc.)
语气是否自然亲切，不像广告模板: Check if tone is natural and friendly, not like an ad template
字数是否在100-140字范围内: Check if word count is within 100-140 characters
门店地址和联系方式是否正确: Check if store address and contact info are correct
推卸责任、否认客户感受，会加剧矛盾: Shifting blame and denying customer feelings will escalate the conflict
菜都凉了，而且分量也太少了吧，再也不会点了。: The food was cold and the portions were too small. I will never order again.
真的很抱歉这次体验不好。菜品温度问题我们会和配送环节一起排查改进。分量方面我核实: We are truly sorry about this experience. We will investigate the food temperature issue together with our delivery process. Regarding portions, I checked and there may have been an oversight during packaging. Please add us on WeChat and we will send you a complimentary side dish next time as an apology.
抱歉没让您吃好，这次确实是我们的问题。已经记录反馈给后厨了，下次点单备注一下我给: Sorry we did not meet your expectations. This was indeed our fault. We have recorded the feedback for our kitchen. Next time you order, leave a note and I will add extra portions for you.
配送慢不是我们的问题，是骑手的事。分量都是标准的。: Slow delivery is not our problem, it is the riders issue. Portions are all standard.
补一份小食有什么用，我要退款。: What good is a complimentary side dish? I want a refund.
理解您的心情。这样吧，我帮您申请这单的部分退款，同时下次下单我再额外送您一个菜。: I understand how you feel. How about this - I will apply for a partial refund on this order, and next time you order I will include an extra dish for free. I hope we get the chance to show you our normal quality.
我想约这周六下午做个头发，有位置吗？: I would like to book a hair appointment this Saturday afternoon. Do you have availability?
周六下午有位置的～您想约几点呢？2点和4点都可以。另外您是想做什么项目？剪发、烫: Saturday afternoon is available! What time works for you? 2pm and 4pm are both open. Also, what service are you looking for - haircut, perm/color, or treatment? I will reserve the appropriate time for you.
周六下午目前还剩4点的位置，2点已经约满了。您4点方便吗？如果时间不合适，周日上: Saturday afternoon currently only has the 4pm slot available - 2pm is fully booked. Does 4pm work for you? If not, Sunday morning also has openings.
4点可以，我想烫个卷发，大概多少钱？: 4pm works. I want to get a perm, roughly how much would that cost?
好的，帮您约了周六下午4点烫发。根据发长和药水不同，价格在280-480之间，到: Great, I have booked you for Saturday at 4pm for a perm. Depending on hair length and products used, the price ranges from 280-480 yuan. Our stylist Tony will give you specific recommendations based on your hair type and desired look when you arrive. A perm takes about 3 hours, so please plan accordingly. No need to wash your hair before coming in.
这个能便宜点吗？别家比你们便宜好多。: Can you give me a discount? Other stores are much cheaper.
理解您想找性价比高的，我们这款用的是XX材质，耐用度会好很多。如果您今天确定的话: I understand you are looking for good value. This product uses XX material which is much more durable. If you decide today, I can apply for a small gift for you.
不行，这个价格已经很低了，不能再少了。: No, this price is already very low. We cannot go any lower.
赠品不要，直接减20块行不行？: I do not want a gift, just take 20 yuan off directly.
20块确实超出我的权限了，这样吧，我帮您看看能不能申请减10元或者送运费险，您看: 20 yuan is beyond my authority. How about this - let me see if I can apply for a 10 yuan discount or free shipping insurance. Would that work? If not, feel free to take your time to think about it.
这款确实是我们品质比较好的，价格已经是活动价了。如果预算有限，我可以推荐另一款性: This is indeed one of our higher quality items, and the price is already the promotional price. If your budget is limited, I can recommend another option with better value for money?
我要退款，这个东西和图片差太多了，色差很大。: I want a refund. This item looks nothing like the pictures - the color difference is huge.
抱歉给您带来困扰。方便发张实物照片给我看看吗？我核实一下是不是发错色号了。如果确: Sorry for the trouble. Could you send me a photo of the actual item? Let me check if we sent the wrong color. If there is indeed an issue, we can process a return or exchange.
我们详情页写了色差属于正常现象，不支持退款。: Our product page states that color differences are normal and refunds are not supported.
不好意思，屏幕显示确实可能有色差。支持7天无理由退换，我给您发退货地址，运费我们: Sorry about that. Screen displays can indeed cause color differences. We support 7-day no-reason returns - I will send you the return address and we will cover shipping. If you prefer not to return it, we can also offer a 10 yuan discount as compensation. Which would you prefer?
我不想退了太麻烦，但是你们得给我补偿。: I do not want to return it - too much hassle. But you need to compensate me.
理解，退货确实麻烦。这样吧，给您退差价10元到账户余额，下次购物可以直接抵扣。另: Understood, returns can be a hassle. How about this - we will refund 10 yuan to your account balance that you can use on your next purchase. We will also give you a 5 yuan off coupon for orders over 50 yuan as a gesture of goodwill.
